description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa featuring three blue seat cushions and three matching blue backrest cushions, all with a uniform rectangular shape. The sofa has a chaise lounge extension on the right side, providing extra legroom or a lounging area. The armrests are clad in a light brown wood-like material with darker brown padded tops, adding both comfort and a visual contrast. The frame and back panel are finished in a light wood texture, while the legs are short, cylindrical, and dark-colored, providing sturdy support. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for urban environments such as waiting areas, lobbies, or public lounges. The upholstery appears smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern sectional sofa with blue cushions, light wood frame, and brown padded armrests, featuring a right-side chaise lounge. The design is clean, functional, and visually contrasting.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue seat and back cushions, brown armrests, and the chaise lounge extension on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chaise lounge extension, the thickness of the cushions, and the wood-textured armrest and frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous light wood back panel and the tops of the backrest cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sectional layout, armrest profile, and the arrangement of the seat cushions.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual blue seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all rectangular and uniform in size, with one seat cushion extending as a chaise lounge. Cushions appear attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present on both sides, medium height relative to the seat, with a straight profile. They feature a light wood exterior and a darker brown padded top for comfort and visual contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Six short, cylindrical legs, dark in color, positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support. The legs are exposed and likely made of metal or hard plastic.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest composed of three segmented, rectangular cushions, matching the seat cushions in size and color. No visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid blue with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
